Problem Statement: In the following exercises, solve
Question: The product of two consecutive integers is 156. Find the integers.

Problem Statement: In the following exercises, solve
Question: The area of a rectangular place mat is 168 square inches. Its length is two inches longer than the width. Find the length and width of the placemat.
Answer: The width is 12 inches and the length is 14 inches.

Problem Statement: In the following exercises, solve
Question: Jing is going to throw a ball from the balcony of her condo. When she throws the ball from 80 feet above the ground, the function $$h ( t ) = -16 t^{2} + 64 t + 80$$ models the height, h , of the ball above the ground as a function of time, t . Find: ⓐ the zeros of this function which tells us when the ball will hit the ground. ⓑ the time(s) the ball will be 128 feet above the ground. ⓒ the height the ball will be at $$t = 4$$ seconds.

Problem Statement: In the following exercises, solve
Question: For the function, $$f ( x ) = x^{2} - 7 x + 5 ,$$ ⓐ find when $$f ( x ) = -7$$ ⓑ Use this information to find two points that lie on the graph of the function.

Problem Statement: In the following exercises, solve
Question: For the function $$f ( x ) = 25 x^{2} - 81 ,$$ find: ⓐ the zeros of the function ⓑ the x -intercepts of the graph of the function ⓒ the y -intercept of the graph of the function.
